meaning: adj.[海](帆船)能驶向上风的,能抢风航行的
examples: The lyrics to Danny Boy were written by English lawyer and lyricist Frederic Weatherly in 1910.
Weatherly, 40, shares three golden rules: Identify your market differentiators and stay true to them, define your culture and model your culture's values every day, and be persistent. --S.W.
It is believed Fred Weatherly wrote Danny Boy while living at Combe Down, in Bath.
"As far as I know Fred Weatherly had never been to Ireland, " Phil Weatherly told BBC Inside Out West.
